headline: Tesla’s Terafab AI Chip Push Meets Easing Autonomy Regulatory Pressure
summary: Intel has joined Tesla (NasdaqGS:TSLA), SpaceX, and xAI in a new Terafab AI chip manufacturing initiative focused on domestic production for advanced computing. The Terafab facility is intended to support AI, robotics, and autonomous vehicle workloads across the partnered companies. The US National Highway Traffic Safety Administration has closed its probe into Tesla’s "Actually Smart Summon" feature, allowing continued deployment of the capability. Tesla, listed as NasdaqGS:TSLA, is...

headline: From flying cars to self-driving cars: CEOs weigh in
summary: Archer Aviation Founder and CEO Adam Goldstein joins Opening Bid Unfiltered with Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi to chat about the future of flying cars. Goldstein explains why he is so passionate about EVTOLs (Electric Vertical Takeoff and Landing) and key milestones for Archer Aviation this year.  Then, Sozzi chats with DVx Ventures CEO and former Tesla executive Jon McNeill about the future of autonomous driving and what he learned from Elon Musk during his time at Tesla.

content.title: From flying cars to self-driving cars: CEOs weigh in
content.description:
Archer Aviation Founder and CEO Adam Goldstein joins Opening Bid Unfiltered with Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi to chat about the future of flying cars. Goldstein explains why he is so passionate about EVTOLs (Electric Vertical Takeoff and Landing) and key milestones for Archer Aviation this year. 

Then, Sozzi chats with DVx Ventures CEO and former Tesla executive Jon McNeill about the future of autonomous driving and what he learned from Elon Musk during his time at Tesla.
content.summary: Archer Aviation Founder and CEO Adam Goldstein joins Opening Bid Unfiltered with Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi to chat about the future of flying cars. Goldstein explains why he is so passionate about EVTOLs (Electric Vertical Takeoff and Landing) and key milestones for Archer Aviation this year.  Then, Sozzi chats with DVx Ventures CEO and former Tesla executive Jon McNeill about the future of autonomous driving and what he learned from Elon Musk during his time at Tesla.

headline: Energy Transition Today - Genie Energy: Navigating Financial Reporting Challenges Amidst Transition
summary: Genie Energy Ltd., a provider of retail and renewable energy solutions, announced that it received a notice from the New York Stock Exchange regarding a delay in filing its annual report. The delay is due to the necessity of preparing restated audited financial statements for previous years, which would be included in the comprehensive report for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2025. This development highlights challenges in financial reporting within the energy sector during the ongoing...

headline: Why Intel Stock Soared 43% in Just 6 Days—and Why It’s Dropping Today
summary: The chip company’s stellar streak is under threat early Thursday as the shares pointed 1.7% lower in premarket trading.  The move lower also appears to be tied to broader market weakness—and creeping doubts about the U.S.-Iran cease-fire agreement.  Intel announced it was joining  Tesla  and SpaceX’s Terafab project—Elon Musk’s semiconductor production plan, which he has described as the “most epic chip building exercise in history.”

content.title: Why Intel Stock Soared 43% in Just 6 Days—and Why It’s Dropping Today
content.summary: The chip company’s stellar streak is under threat early Thursday as the shares pointed 1.7% lower in premarket trading.  The move lower also appears to be tied to broader market weakness—and creeping doubts about the U.S.-Iran cease-fire agreement.  Intel announced it was joining  Tesla  and SpaceX’s Terafab project—Elon Musk’s semiconductor production plan, which he has described as the “most epic chip building exercise in history.”

headline: Intel Stock Soared 43% in Just 6 Days. Why It’s Hitting a Nearly 5-Year High Today.
summary: Intel stock has been on an incredible run and the gains just keep on coming.  The chip company’s stellar streak was under threat early Thursday until it announced a multiyear collaboration with  Google  to advance the next generation of artificial intelligence and cloud infrastructure.  The stock rose 3.1% to $60.77, which would be its highest close since April 22, 2021, after initially trading more than 1.5% lower in premarket trading.

content.title: Intel Stock Soared 43% in Just 6 Days. Why It’s Hitting a Nearly 5-Year High Today.
content.summary: Intel stock has been on an incredible run and the gains just keep on coming.  The chip company’s stellar streak was under threat early Thursday until it announced a multiyear collaboration with  Google  to advance the next generation of artificial intelligence and cloud infrastructure.  The stock rose 3.1% to $60.77, which would be its highest close since April 22, 2021, after initially trading more than 1.5% lower in premarket trading.
